title: Beyond the Hype: Token Dynamics & AI Sovereignty
description: Token economics, inference cost structures, model portability, and AI sovereignty choices — an execution-first lens for leaders moving AI from pilots to core operations.

title: Beyond the Hype: Operationalizing AI for the Next Billion
description: Custom inferencing silicon, multilingual AI across 22 Indic languages, and real-world deployments in healthcare, mobility, and food systems. Where execution replaces hype.

title: After the Summit Lights Fade: Hard Decisions for India's AI Decade
description: Hard decisions for CTOs shaping 12–24 month roadmaps: digital rails, healthcare AI governance, voice-first design, and board-level AI accountability.
